text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and was published at CVPR 2025 (winning Best Paper Award), with an arXiv entry (2503.11651) and an official CVF Open Access page. The true title is "VGGT: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer" — the cited title adds "for universal 3d reconstruction" which is a minor subtitle inaccuracy, but the first author Jianyuan Wang matches exactly and the venue/year are correct.
LINK: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2025/html/Wang_VGGT_Visual_Geometry_Grounded_Transformer_CVPR_2025_paper.html
